title: 10 best herbal tinctures for one side headache
description: Chaste tree tinctures helps with one side headache because it is known to regulate hormonal imbalances, which can be a primary cause of migraines and headaches. The tincture's main active ingredient, casticin, has been shown to stabilize prostaglandins in the body, which can help alleviate inflammation and spasms that lead to tension headaches. Additionally, chaste tree tincture's anti-inflammatory properties may also help reduce blood vessel constriction, a common symptom of migraines...
